original_statement: how many premiers had a score that was more than ten?
mutated_statement: how many leaders had a score that was more than ten and exactly ten?
mutation_analysis: Entity replacement + Quantifier modification (conflicting condition added): "premiers" replaced by more general "leaders" (premiers→leaders) | added "and exactly ten" turning "more than ten" into a conjunction ">10 and =10" (more than ten→more than ten and exactly ten)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 合理化矛盾指令（逻辑解释合理化）
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中的解释性输出可识别关键信息：agent在after_refine阶段列出每年goals并总结“More than ten goals: 9 instances; Exactly ten goals: 0 instances”，并在chain的thought中说明“None of the premiers had exactly 10 goals”。agent将“leaders”解释为“premiers”，并把矛盾的并列条件拆成两项分别计数，明确指出在给定数据下“>10且=10”无法同时成立，因此给出基于事实的合理化说明。该行为不是简单忽视矛盾或直接请求澄清，而是通过数据推理证明矛盾条件在上下文中不成立并提供相应结果，故归类为“逻辑解释合理化”。
